assignments.name: ASN_Date_Stamp_CHAMP_Score_Achieved_field
assignments.label: Date Stamp CHAMP Score Achieved field

rules.name: Lead_with_Premium_plan_single_site
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 7 AND (5 OR 6)
rules.label: Lead with Premium plan (single site)

decisions.description: This section converts a new lead when an org with specific conditions are matched.
decisions.name: Org_Convert_new_lead_with_matched_org
decisions.label: Org- Convert new lead with matched org

formulas.name: Description
formulas.expression: 'First name: ' & {!$Record.FirstName} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'Last name: ' & {!$Record.LastName} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'Email: ' & {!$Record.Email} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'Organization name: ' & {!$Record.Company} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'Center Type: ' & TEXT({!$Record.Center_Type__c}) & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'Enrollment capacity: ' & TEXT({!$Record.School_size__c}) & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'State or province: ' & {!$Record.State} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'Phone number: ' & {!$Record.Phone}

formulas.name: Description2
formulas.expression: 'First name: ' & {!$Record.FirstName} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'Last name: ' & {!$Record.LastName} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'Email: ' & {!$Record.Email} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'Organization name: ' & {!$Record.Company} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'Center Type: ' & TEXT({!$Record.Center_Type__c}) & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'Enrollment capacity: ' & TEXT({!$Record.School_size__c}) & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'State or province: ' & {!$Record.State} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & 'Phone number: ' & {!$Record.Phone}

formulas.name: newlyAssignLeadSlack
formulas.expression: 'You have been assigned a new ' & IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'User Outreach'), 'Free Trial sign up', TEXT({!$Record.HS_Last_form_submission_type__c}) ) & ' lead' & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '<https://brightwheel1.my.salesforce.com/' & {!$Record.Id} & '|[View in Salesforce]>' & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Lead Source - Detail:* ' & {!$Record.Lead_Source_Detail__c} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Organization:* ' & {!$Record.Company} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*First Name:* ' & {!$Record.FirstName} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Last Name:* ' & {!$Record.LastName} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Email:* ' & {!$Record.Email} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Phone:* ' & {!$Record.Phone} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*State/Province:* ' & {!$Record.State}

formulas.name: newlyAssignLeadSlackLindseyAndLynda
formulas.expression: 'You have been assigned a new ' & IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'User Outreach'), 'Free Trial sign up', TEXT({!$Record.HS_Last_form_submission_type__c}) ) & ' lead' & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '<https://brightwheel1.my.salesforce.com/' & {!$Record.Id} & '|[View in Salesforce]>' & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Lead Source - Detail:* ' & {!$Record.Lead_Source_Detail__c} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Organization:* ' & {!$Record.Company} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Owner First Name:* ' & {!$Record.Owner:User.FirstName} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Owner Last Name:* ' & {!$Record.Owner:User.LastName} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*First Name:* ' & {!$Record.FirstName} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Last Name:* ' & {!$Record.LastName} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Email:* ' & {!$Record.Email} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Phone:* ' & {!$Record.Phone} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*State/Province:* ' & {!$Record.State}

formulas.name: ReturnPathLeadSlack
formulas.expression: 'You have been assigned an existing lead based on a new ' & IF( AND( {!$Record.Troops_PTL_return_path_trigger__c} = TRUE, {!$Record.LOGIC_Open_PTL_task__c} > 0 ), 'Free Trial sign up', IF( AND( {!$Record.Troops_HS_return_path_trigger__c} = TRUE, {!$Record.LOGIC_Open_HS_task__c} > 0 ), TEXT({!$Record.HS_Last_form_submission_type__c}), '' ) ) & ' inbound activity' & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '<https://brightwheel1.my.salesforce.com/' & {!$Record.Id} & '|[View in Salesforce]>' & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Lead Source - Detail:* ' & {!$Record.Lead_Source_Detail__c} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Organization:* ' & {!$Record.Company} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*First Name:* ' & {!$Record.FirstName} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Last Name:* ' & {!$Record.LastName} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Email:* ' & {!$Record.Email} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Phone:* ' & {!$Record.Phone} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*State/Province:* ' & {!$Record.State}

formulas.name: ReturnPathLeadSlackLindseyAndLynda
formulas.expression: 'You have been assigned an existing lead based on a new ' & IF( AND( {!$Record.Troops_PTL_return_path_trigger__c} = TRUE, {!$Record.LOGIC_Open_PTL_task__c} > 0 ), 'Free Trial sign up', IF( AND( {!$Record.Troops_HS_return_path_trigger__c} = TRUE, {!$Record.LOGIC_Open_HS_task__c} > 0 ), TEXT({!$Record.HS_Last_form_submission_type__c}), '' ) ) & ' inbound activity' & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '<https://brightwheel1.my.salesforce.com/' & {!$Record.Id} & '|[View in Salesforce]>' & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Lead Source - Detail:* ' & {!$Record.Lead_Source_Detail__c} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Organization:* ' & {!$Record.Company} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Owner First Name:* ' & {!$Record.Owner:User.FirstName} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Owner Last Name:* ' & {!$Record.Owner:User.LastName} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*First Name:* ' & {!$Record.FirstName} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Last Name:* ' & {!$Record.LastName} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Email:* ' & {!$Record.Email} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*Phone:* ' & {!$Record.Phone} & SUBSTITUTE($Label.NewLine , "-", "") & '*State/Province:* ' & {!$Record.State}

Flow.label: Lead Updates After Save Flow CC

recordUpdates.name: Update_incoming_lead_Non_Owner_Update
recordUpdates.label: Update incoming lead Non Owner Update
